steps.description: In the "1. CT volume - bone density for optimization" section, select the CT volume for processing.

sub_operations.description: Select the CT volume for bone density optimization
sub_operations.question: Select the CT volume for processing.

choice_info.question: Select the CT volume for processing.

ui_guidance.title: Select CT Volume
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose the CT volume for processing.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, create a new segmentation named "Bone_Segmentation".

sub_operations.description: Create a new segmentation named 'Bone_Segmentation'

ui_guidance.title: Create Bone Segmentation
ui_guidance.instruction: Switch to Segment Editor module and create a new segmentation named 'Bone_Segmentation'.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Add" button and rename the segment to "Bone_Segment".

sub_operations.description: Add a segment and rename to 'Bone_Segment'

ui_guidance.title: Add Segment
ui_guidance.instruction: Click 'Add' to create a new segment and rename it to 'Bone_Segment'.

operation_descriptions: Add a segment and rename to 'Bone_Segment'

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Threshold" button.

sub_operations.description: Open Threshold effect in Segment Editor

ui_guidance.title: Open Threshold
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Threshold' button in Segment Editor.

operation_descriptions: Open Threshold effect in Segment Editor

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range.

sub_operations.description: Set threshold range for bone segmentation
sub_operations.question: Set the threshold range for segmentation.

choice_info.question: Set the threshold range for segmentation.

ui_guidance.title: Set Threshold Range
ui_guidance.instruction: Adjust the threshold slider to define the bone segmentation range.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.

sub_operations.description: Apply threshold effect

ui_guidance.title: Apply Threshold
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Apply' button to run thresholding.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Islands" button.

sub_operations.description: Open Islands effect in Segment Editor

ui_guidance.title: Open Islands
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Islands' button.

operation_descriptions: Open Islands effect in Segment Editor

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, select the "Keep largest island" option.

sub_operations.description: Select 'Keep largest island' option

ui_guidance.title: Keep Largest Island
ui_guidance.instruction: Select the 'Keep largest island' option.

steps.description: In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.

sub_operations.description: Apply islands effect

ui_guidance.title: Apply Islands
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Apply' button to keep the largest island.

steps.description: In the "Bone segmentation" section, select the segment node.

sub_operations.description: Select the bone segment node for 3D reconstruction
sub_operations.question: Select the bone segment node.

ui_guidance.title: Select Bone Segment
ui_guidance.instruction: Select the bone segment node from the scene.

steps.description: Click the "3D Reconstruction" button.

sub_operations.description: Perform 3D reconstruction from bone segmentation

ui_guidance.title: 3D Reconstruction
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the '3D Reconstruction' button.

steps.description: Manually adjust the 3D view to get the best angle for placing the fiducial point on the glenoid cavity surface.

sub_operations.description: Adjust 3D view for optimal fiducial placement angle

ui_guidance.title: Adjust View for Fiducial Placement
ui_guidance.instruction: Rotate and zoom the 3D view to get a clear angle of the glenoid cavity surface.

steps.description: In the "Markups" module, click "Point List" to create an empty MarkupsFiducial node named "Prosthesis_center_point".

sub_operations.description: Create empty MarkupsFiducial node named 'Prosthesis_center_point'

ui_guidance.title: Create Prosthesis Center Point
ui_guidance.instruction: Switch to Markups module, click 'Point List', and create a fiducial node named 'Prosthesis_center_point'.

steps.description: Manually click on the glenoid cavity surface to select a point for the "Prosthesis_center_point".

sub_operations.description: Place fiducial point on glenoid cavity surface
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Click on the glenoid cavity surface in the 3D view to place the point.

steps.placement_instructions: Click on the glenoid cavity surface in the 3D view to place the point.

ui_guidance.title: Place Prosthesis Center Point
ui_guidance.instruction: Click on the glenoid cavity surface to place the center point.

steps.description: In the "Planning point" section, select the MarkupsFiducial node.

sub_operations.description: Select the placed fiducial node for planning
sub_operations.question: Select the MarkupsFiducial node.

ui_guidance.title: Select Planning Point
ui_guidance.instruction: Select the MarkupsFiducial node you just created.

steps.description: Click the "Prosthesis implantation" button.

sub_operations.description: Implant prosthesis at selected point

ui_guidance.title: Prosthesis Implantation
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Prosthesis implantation' button.

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, check the "Adjust Prosthesis (3D transform handles)" box. If not, proceed to Step 20.

sub_operations.description: Ask whether to adjust prosthesis using 3D transform handles
sub_operations.question: Do you need to adjust the prosthesis?

choice_info.question: Do you need to adjust the prosthesis?

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Prosthesis?
ui_guidance.instruction: If needed, check the 'Adjust Prosthesis (3D transform handles)' box, otherwise click Done to continue.

steps.description: Manually adjust the 3D transform handles.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust 3D transform handles to refine prosthesis position

controller.prompt: Further adjustments required? Check the 'Adjust Prosthesis (3D transform handles)' box.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust View for Prosthesis
ui_guidance.instruction: Rotate and zoom the 3D view to inspect the prosthesis placement.

steps.description: Click the "Update Prosthesis" button.

sub_operations.description: Apply prosthesis adjustments

controller.prompt: Further adjustments required? Check the 'Adjust Prosthesis (3D transform handles)' box.

ui_guidance.title: Update Prosthesis
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Update Prosthesis' button.

steps.description: Click the "Plan" button.

sub_operations.description: Generate surgical plan

ui_guidance.title: Generate Plan
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Plan' button to generate the screw plan.

steps.description: If further adjustments are required, check the "Adjust screw" box. If not, stop here.

sub_operations.description: Ask whether to adjust screw
sub_operations.question: Do you need to adjust the screw?

choice_info.question: Do you need to adjust the screw?

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Screw?
ui_guidance.instruction: If needed, check the 'Adjust screw' box, otherwise click Done to finish.

steps.description: Manually adjust the endpoints of the planning paths.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust endpoints of planning paths (screw lines)

controller.prompt: Further screw adjustments required? Check the 'Adjust screw' box.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust View for Screw Paths
ui_guidance.instruction: Rotate and zoom the 3D view to clearly see the planning paths.

steps.description: Click the "Update screw" button.

sub_operations.description: Apply screw adjustments

controller.prompt: Further screw adjustments required? Check the 'Adjust screw' box.

ui_guidance.title: Update Screw
ui_guidance.instruction: Click the 'Update screw' button.

controller.prompt: Further adjustments required? Check the 'Adjust Prosthesis (3D transform handles)' box.
Further screw adjustments required? Check the 'Adjust screw' box.
